parsed.rationale: The contour lines around waypoint D are labeled with the elevation 6800 ft. Since the contour interval is 40 feet, the next higher contour line would be at 6840 ft, and the one after that at 6880 ft. Waypoint D is between the 6840 ft and 6880 ft lines, closer to the 6840 ft line, so the elevation is approximately 6863 ft.
